span.p: Step 1: Create room record in PostgreSQL

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 2: Select SFU region
(closest to participant centroid)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 3: Allocate SFU media session
(reserve CPU/bandwidth on SFU pod)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 4: Generate ICE candidates
(STUN binding, TURN allocation)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 5: Exchange SDP offer/answer
(client ↔ SFU via signaling server)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 6: ICE connectivity checks
(find best network path)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 7: DTLS handshake
(establish encrypted media channel)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compensate: Release SFU resources
Notify client: connection failed
Suggest network troubleshooting

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Step 9: Notify other participants
(new participant joined event)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compensate: Try alternate SFU region
If all regions full: reject with 'room full'
